title: stenotaphrum micranthum
intro: Stenotaphrum micranthum, also known as buffalo grass or St. Augustine grass, is a type of warm-season grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds that can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Stenotaphrum micranthum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made through infusion or decoction, allowing for the extraction of its medicinal compounds and utilization in traditional medicine.
